title: Rotor-Gene SYBR Green qPCR
description: QIAGEN SYBR Green 25 uL qPCR for the Rotor-Gene Q: 5 min 95 C activation, fast 2-step cycling, 60-95 C melt curve.

final.name: Melt curve: 60 to 95 C, 1 C/step (90 sec pre-melt, then 5 sec/step)

ingredients.name: Rotor-Gene SYBR Green PCR Master Mix

payload.notes: SYBR Green chemistry for the Rotor-Gene Q / 3000 / 6000 rotary cyclers; run the melt curve (ramp 60 to 95 C, rising 1 C per step, 90 sec pre-melt hold then 5 sec per step, acquire on Green) to confirm specificity. The fast 2-step protocol is enabled by the Q-Bond additive. Primers 1 uM each final; amplicon 60-200 bp; up to 100 ng template. 35-40 cycles depending on template amount. No ROX needed (rotary optics). Source: QIAGEN Rotor-Gene SYBR Green PCR Kit Handbook (01/2014), https://www.qiagen.com/us/resources/download/KitHandbook/en-rotor-gene-sybr-green-handbook
